medialive.channel.ttmldestinationsetting:
The setup of TTML captions in the output.

The parent of this entity is CaptionDestinationSettings.

medialive.channel.ttmldestinationsetting.Description: When set to passthrough, passes through style and position information from a TTML-like input source (TTML, SMPTE-TT, CFF-TT) to the CFF-TT output or TTML output.
